app.name: .NET SDK Core
app.one_liner: Shared infrastructure for creating and managing .NET projects across Visual Studio and the .NET CLI.

screens.name: Project Creation Interface
screens.purpose: Allows users to select and instantiate project templates using the Template Engine.

rust_commands.name: discover_templates
rust_commands.purpose: Fetches available project templates from local or remote sources using the Template Engine.

rust_commands.name: invoke_packaged_tool
rust_commands.purpose: Executes a .NET tool whose package name may differ from its output DLL name.

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate Template Engine with secure network layer
week 1: Stabilize MSBuild task execution across platforms
week 1: Validate containerized CI environment setup
acceptance_tests: Docker Buildx is available in container test environments
Packaged tools with mismatched package/DLL names execute correctly
Template discovery succeeds over SSL on macOS without connection reset
